text:
Rewrite is the fourth and final opening song (second in the English dub on Adult Swim) for Fullmetal Alchemist. It is performed by Asian Kung-Fu Generation. The song won the Best Anime Theme Song at the American Anime Awards in 2007. There's also an official English version written by the Darling Thieves.

 Lyrics : 

Kishin da omoi wo hakidashitai no wa Sonzai no shoumei ga hoka ni nai kara Tsukan da hazu no boku no mirai wa "Songen" to "jiyuu" de mujun shiteru yo 

Yugan da zanzou wo keshi saritai no wa Jibun no genkai wo soko ni miru kara Jiishiki kajou na boku no mado ni wa Kyonen no karendaa hidzuke ga nai yo 

[Chorus]

Keshite riraito shite Kudaranai chou gensou Wasurarenu sonzai kan wo Kishikaisei riraito shite Imi no nai souzou mo Kimi wo nasu gendouryoku Zenshin zenrei wo kure yo

English:

The reason I want to spit out these sentiments 
is I have no other proof I even exist 
my future that I thought I managed to grasp 
is a contradiction of all I thought that I had

The reason I want this old image erased 
is I see my own limits and I'm out of place 
In the window of my own self-consciousness 
I see last year's calendar, with no dates on it

Now I, I rewrite 
All these worthless visions, and I'll be unforgettable 
Come to life, and rewrite. 
All my bad ideas 
I will make them disappear before your eyes. 

Trivia

Rewrite is the only opening song from the 2003 anime that didn't get used in any Fullmetal Alchemist video games:
Melissa was used in Stray Rondo (including one normal variant and one reprise variant), Dual Sympathy, and Trading Card Game (DS)
Ready Steady Go! was used in Fullmetal Alchemist 2: Curse of the Crimson Elixir
Undo was used in Sonata of Memories and Dream Carnival
This opening has appeared in several rhythm games, which include, among others:
Daigasso! Band Brothers (only on the Tsuika Kyoku Cartridge, the base game also includes Melissa and Ready Steady Go!)
Donkey Konga 3
GuitarFreaks V2 & DrumMania V2
GuitarFreaksXG & DrumManiaXG
Jubeat (2021)
Reflec Beat Colette
